top_signals.title: Defense startups raid auto and fracking sectors for parts to speed weapons output
top_signals.summary: Defense tech startups are repurposing automotive chips and pipes used in fracking in an effort to deliver weapons to the Pentagon faster and at lower cost.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
